nasb.text: And in the tribe with which the alien stays, there you shall give him his inheritance,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: In whatever tribe the sojourner resides, there you shall assign him his inheritance, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 將來無論在哪一支派裡，若有外族人寄居，你們就要在那裡把他的產業分給他。”這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他们居住在哪一支派，哪一支派便要把产业分给他们。这是主耶和华说的。”
